reviews.comment:

Fuel may be in short supply, and it's rather expensive.

reviews.comment:

Good place to recharge, the kiosk should be a bit better stocked

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar de paso inevitable. No se confíen especialmente cuando terminan las vacaciones

(Translated by Google)
It's an unavoidable place to pass through. Don't let your guard down, especially after your vacation ends.

reviews.comment:

They tear your head off with everything

reviews.comment:
Ahora tienen el auto service, pero deberian mejorar la atencion de los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
They now have self-service, but they should improve the service provided by the attendants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3ck51cDBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Para los nafteros un oasis en la ruta, obligado a parar; para los diesel, una stop no viene nada mal para continuar hasta Sierra Grande, con esto se ahorran tiempo parar en Trelew que siempre hay cola y mucha espera.

(Translated by Google)
For gasoline drivers, this is an oasis on the road, a must-stop; for diesel drivers, a stop is a good way to continue to Sierra Grande. This saves them time stopping in Trelew, where there's always a long line and a long wait.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRLVBTMldnEAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
